desc: Harden completion store (atomic writes, legacy warnings, unit tests), extract FS from protocol validation into injected predicates, replace unsafe casts in reconcile with typed builder + add core algebra unit tests.

init.desc: Anchor: three health deficits identified — completion store race (read-modify-write with no lock), protocol validation FS leak (dynamic import node:fs in pure layer), reconcile type unsafety (7x as any on graph construction). 286 tests passing, tsc clean.

completion-atomic-write.desc: Replace read-modify-write in saveCompletionWithEvidence and saveCompletion with atomic write pattern: write to .roadmap/completed.json.tmp, then rename. Eliminates race where two parallel advance calls clobber each other.

completion-legacy-warn.desc: When hasPassingReceipt returns true for a legacy record (no validationChecks, just completedAt), annotate the record with legacy: true and surface a structured warning in orient output and advance output. Do not change pass/fail semantics — only add visibility.

validation-predicate.desc: Add readFile parameter to validateNode signature: readFile?: (path: string) => string | null. Use it in artifact-schema and spec-conformance rules instead of dynamic import('node:fs'). Shell/spawn validators keep their child_process imports (IO is their purpose). Callers pass fs-backed readFile at the call site in src/cli/advance.ts. The protocol layer becomes pure: given predicates, returns results.

reconcile-typed-builder.desc: Add a buildGraph<T> helper to src/core/reconcile.ts that takes (id, desc, init, term, nodes: Record<string, Flat>) and returns Graph<T> with a single centralized cast. Replace all as-any sites with calls to buildGraph. Net effect: one cast in one place, validated by define() immediately after.

completion-tests.desc: Dedicated unit test suite for CompletionStore. Cover: roundtrip save/load, legacy format migration (migrateEntry), hasPassingReceipt with evidence vs legacy vs failing, validateEntry type guard, filterByDagId, CompletionStore.from fixture, concurrent save detection. Minimum 15 test cases.

core-algebra-tests.desc: Dedicated unit test suite for src/core/ modules. Cover: define (valid graph, cycle detection, missing init/term, convergenceCheck key validation), verify (consumes satisfied, unsatisfied, resolvedBy), check (reachable, orphans, loopTarget), flat/fwd, detectCycles, reach, reconcile/merge/branch/modify with the new buildGraph helper. Pure algebra — no filesystem, no CLI. Minimum 25 test cases.

term.desc: All three health streams hardened. Completion store: atomic writes + legacy visibility + dedicated tests. Protocol validation: pure predicate layer, no hidden FS. Reconcile: single-cast builder + dedicated core algebra tests. Full suite green, tsc clean, zero as-any in reconcile call sites, zero dynamic fs imports in protocol.
